content.text:
Based on the visual inspection of the molecule, I can identify the neighbor atoms of atom index 37 (N):

Atom 37 is nitrogen (N) and is covalently bonded to:
- Atom 28 (C) - carbon
- Atom 38 (O) - oxygen  
- Atom 39 (O) - oxygen

From the image, I can clearly see that nitrogen atom 37 forms three covalent bonds: one to carbon atom 28 and two to oxygen atoms (38 and 39). The geometry appears trigonal planar around the nitrogen atom.

Regarding the geomconf_index, based on the file naming convention in the working directory, the molecule file is named "geomconf_7174.xyz", which indicates that the geomconf_index is 7174.

Therefore, the neighbor atoms of atom 37 (N) are:
- 28 (C)
- 38 (O)
- 39 (O)

And the geomconf_index is 7174.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 37, whose element should be N. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
